title: XP Limiter
description: Adds a way for you to limit everyones experience level. Also syncs the values between client and server.
body:
This mod adds a config value that limits a players xp level, so when the value, which is 250 by default, is set to for example 30, then when a player reaches over 30, their level gets set to 30 again.

The mod is required on serverside and optional on client side, the differences will be in videos below. The config is synced between client and server so the client will not have to do anything.



The gif below shows what would happen if the client doesnt have it installed but the server does. Note the XP bar changing from 10 to 11 and back to 10.

![image of a player using experience bottles showing what would happen if the mod isnt installed client side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5516b7ba46ee33d40af0082fecae74ef4adc645.gif)


And this is if the client does have it installed, note the bar staying at 10:
![image of a player using experience bottles showing what would happen if the mod is installed client side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cde1d905d46b3ef59628c8be67eb76cba6ea10e4.gif)  



Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
